transcript.text:
[Daejeon, a city of food...]
[Full of food trucks]
I'm going to eat everything here
[Seared sushi]
[Chicken skewers]
[Steak]
[Takoyaki]
[Sweet & sour chicken]
[Tteokboki] (spicy rice cake)
[Pizza]
[Fried shrimp, tteok-galbi (grilled rib patties), corn dogs, chicken feet, sausage, chicken heart, pork belly]
I got everything
[People gather to watch the phenomenon]
I've never had this many people watch me eat before
[But that does not stop this mukbang truck...]
[Daebak]

[Alien?]
How can all this food go into that small mouth?
I'm going to go now Good night
[An area filled with lights]
Hello everyone
I got invited to Daejeon's Expo Science Park today
It's crowded with people This festival is filled with music and fountain shows
The Expo owner is supposed to show me around
[The coordinator of this...]
[Black Magic...?]
[Hypnotized by its coruscating performance...]
Stop the music!
Where is he?
-Wait, hi -Hello
Tzuyang Do you know who I am?
[Stop the video]

I'm Twinkle, the Dream Being The mascot of Daejeon
Hello Nice to meet you
Hi You are very respectful
Your mukbang was the first mukbang I watched
-First time? -Yes
I don't know the fun of eating because I don't have a mouth
Snap back, I'm Twinkle
I've been wanting to invite you
Is there going to be good food?
Food? Plenty
This is Hanbit Tower It's where I live
-That's where you live? -Yes
I come from a rich family
We provide food trucks for the Daejeon citizens at Hanbit Square
Jazz water fountain
There are a lot of food trucks

You can eat everything Take it all!
I give you permission to eat whatever you want today
-Free of charge? -Free...?
[Nothing is free] The water fountain is for you...
I noticed that you're a good dance
There was no music...
Eat up
And make sure you pay
I'll be going my way now
I'll see you on YouTube Bye
Let's go eat now I'm going to try everything
[Food truck zone]
I came to the food trucks
I'm going to eat everything Let's go
[1st stop: Takoyaki]
[Let's eat]

It's hot
[Eat slowly ^^]
Really good The sauce is great
Big octopus chunks
How does it taste?
It's so good The best!
Crispy outside soft inside
Wait for the ambulance You will collapse when you taste it
Use the last piece to scrape up the sauce like this
There's a sushi spot here
I'll take 1, please
-Thank you -Enjoy
Seared beef sushi looks so good
Rare on the inside It's just seared on top
The sauce is amazing
With a little bit of wasabi

Yummy
A little sour It's like teriyaki, but better
This is great
It's tasty
The lines got shorter Let's hurry
-Do you still take orders? -Yes
2 chicken skewers, please
Thank you
This looks delicious
Salt
It's hot
Can you see the juice dripping?
So juicy and tender
He told me to drench this in teriyaki sauce
Delicious
There's great music here

And lots of food
Everything was good so far
There are tables over there too
Let's buy a bunch and head over there
Sweet & sour chicken
I'll take 1 order, please
Thank you
Tteokboki too (spicy rice cake)
I'll take 1 order
Thank you
Pizza
Fire oven
Pepperoni, please
Steak sounds good
I'll take 1 Single, please
Thank you Looks tasty

Thank you
What's this over here?
They have booths over here
Lots of different foods It's gonna be great
Thank you
-You're pretty! -Thank you
[Husband & wife owners]
[Then let's buy from them]
[Photos with fans]
Tteok-galbi is the best!
Thank you
I think this place is great to come with friends or family because of all the delicious foods
I'm very satisfied with this night market
Really spacious and nice
1 corn dog
Chicken feet too, please

This is no joke
1 sausage bar and 1 squid bar, please
Thank you
Very cute
This looks good
Chicken heart
Thank you
Jungyuk Restaurant is here? (butcher restaurant)
Pork belly and sikhye, please (sweet rice drink)
[Collecting all the goods...]
[Audience for Tzuyang's mukbang]
Thank you
I got all the food from the food trucks except for desserts
I have all kinds of food here
And a lot of people here watching me
I've never had this many people watch me eat before

I'm nervous I'm having trouble talking
I don't have much time, so let's get started
Bon appetit
Tteokboki first since it's in front of me
This is rice cake made with rice which I love
Tasty
Sweet & sour chicken too
Chicken feet
The sauce tastes good
Chili pepper flavors
It's spicy
Hello
-Hi again -Wait a minute
-Where are you coming from? -Me?
I was trying to sleep, but curiosity got the best of me
So I came out for a walk

Would you like some?
[No mouth]
But I will watch you eat
Okay, I will eat my meal then
I don't know what human food tastes like
Beer tastes that good?
It looks refreshing
PD: What do you eat then?
I eat batteries
I plugged in 229V
110V over here
How can all this food go into that small mouth?
I digest pretty fast
Eat and poop
An alien is bugging your mukbang
What would you like to eat if you were given a mouth?

-Beer -Excuse me?
[Aliens want to get drunk too...]
I'm going to start drooling from my non-existent mouth if I keep watching
I'm gonna have to go And sleep
I will wash my feet and sleep
Seems like it'll take you a while
You say some mean stuff with a smiling face
Guess my shoe size
-500mm? -Correct, 480mm
Goodbye Enjoy your meal
[Let's go charge...]
Chicken heart skewers
You must take a big bite
Chewy and delicious
Twinkle is taking photos
[He has become a star]

Let's eat now Now's the time
I was really embarrassed
I wanted churros too
Churros are so good...
-Is it? -Yes!
Did Twinkle leave?
[Finally, Twinkle gets to rest...]
Chicken skewers Really big
Yum
Steak tasted really good
So good
I come to Daejeon for mukbang a lot Almost as much as Seoul
First time here at the expo
It's decorated well here There's a lot to see here, so it's nice
[Churros shop owner heard she wanted churros]
-I'm a fan -Thank you

I wanted some Thank you
So good
It's really crispy And it melts in my mouth
Chewy and really delicious
This is so good
Thank you
Reheated Tteok-galbi
So good
True meat flavors instead of sauce flavors
A very popping texture
I checked out the expo dates because I wanted to come here on my own time again
But sadly they will be closed until Springtime
This isn't just for this season
So everyone can revisit during Spring
The food got cold, so they're microwaving them for me
So the Hanbit Tower is like Namsan Tower in Seoul

It's circular, so I'm guessing there's a lounge up there
Dark beer
[Giving the beer away]
Beer as a gift
Thank you
I didn't go to the dessert shop over there
They prepared a placard for me
[The owners made placards for Tzuyang]
Hello
Tzuyang,
[Welcome]
[They custom ordered them just for Tzuyang]
How do I look?
Thank you
Give me 1 of everything here
Our chili pepper tomato jam is the signature

That's good
[Picking out her order]
[Wait, how about our scones?]
I'll take them too
-We prepared something else for you -What is it?
[Just for Tzuyang]
[Name engraved too]
[There's more?!]
[Egg tarts...]
Thank you so much
I'll pay for it, really
Thank you
This is on me
Thank you
This is just what I like
They're all starting to close

That looks good
Ssamjang on top (soybean seasoning paste)
Really tasty
Yummy!
The fat is chewy
And the meat is not dry Tender and tasty
Thank you for warming it up
Hot food is the best
With kimchi and garlic
[These 2 are still watching..!]
You guys must be cold
The potato
Really thin and tasty
The churros shop does a good job
Tasty
-Stir-fried kimchi -Thank you

How did he know I wanted some?
This isn't edible, right?
It has gotten too late here And they all closed
They are waiting for me because they want to provide light for me
I will to-go these to finish at home since it's getting cold anyway
We will end it here
[Thank you for watching my mukbang!]
There are a lot of eateries and tourist spots in Daejeon
It was my first time coming to something like this
I definitely want to come back here for this I really loved it
They will be opening again in Spring so...
It will be nice for you to come here with your family or significant other
Thanks everyone
[How about visiting Daejeon this upcoming holiday?]
Hello everyone
I've been promoting our local fruits with TMON

We have persimmons today
Persimmons are full of vitamins A & C
Let's cut it up
I learned this when I was young Do you see the X here?
You're supposed to cut it right in between
This knife is too small
I heard there are no seeds
Nevermind
I guess not
It's been so long
This looks very sweet
Juicy
The bitter taste of persimmon is what is called "Tannin"
It lowers blood levels and also detoxes bacterias in your body
It's soft These are the best
Bon appetit

It's been a while, and it's really tasty
It's both soft and crunchy
The soft spots are really sweet
Sweet persimmon
A way to see which persimmons are good
Pretty ends
And if there are white spots on it
It's really tasty
All kinds of persimmon are delicious
A squishy one
Let's try it like this
It's really sweet
This is my 5th fruit-promotional video
And I think persimmons are great
November 4th is "Sweet Persimmon Day"
If you can gift your friends, family, or lover persimmons

It will help our farmers immensely
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
